steps.title: Track each rebound height
steps.content:
Each bounce reaches one-half the previous falling height. Starting from $24.0$ feet:
$$24.0\div2=12.0$$
$$12.0\div2=6.0$$
$$6.0\div2=3.0$$

steps.title: Identify the requested bounce
steps.content: Between the third and fourth ground hits, the ball is on the bounce after the third hit, so its maximum height is the third rebound height. The answer is 3.0.
